pageContext.styleModeHint: When enabled, send, resend, and refresh inject DOM/CSS-derived page design signals. This is not a screenshot and should only support approximate style analysis.
pageContext.disabled: Automatic context is off for this conversation
pageContext.masterDisabled: Automatic page context is globally disabled in Settings
pageContext.masterDisabledHint: Turn automatic page context back on in Extension Settings first
pageContext.disabledByAssistant: This assistant disables automatic page context
pageContext.pendingCollection: Body content will be collected on send, resend, or manual refresh
pageContext.pendingCollectionFullPage: Full-page mode is on. Body content will be collected on send, resend, or refresh, with a {{count}}-char body budget
pageContext.pendingCollectionWithStyleSignals: Style mode is on. Page design signals will be injected on send, resend, or refresh
pageContext.bodyUnavailable: Page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
pageContext.noSnippet: No body preview is available for this run

styleCapture.title: Style screenshots
styleCapture.hiddenInput: Screenshots are used only as this turn's vision-model input and are not shown as chat attachments.
styleCapture.modelNotVision: The current target model is not marked as supporting vision input, so screenshots were not attached.
styleCapture.empty: Screenshots were requested, but no frame was available for this run
styleCapture.warningWithCode: Screenshots failed or timed out for this run, so it fell back to DOM/CSS design signals only: {{code}}

pageContext.fullModeHint: When enabled, send, resend, and refresh inject more page body content with a current body budget of {{count}} chars.

viewStatus.stale: The page identity changed; body and style sources will be collected on demand
viewStatus.degraded: Page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
viewStatus.unavailable: The current page context is unavailable

issue.pageUncollectable: This page does not support page text reading
issue.contentScriptUnreachable: Page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
issue.contentScriptInjectionFailed: Page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
issue.emptyBody: This page has no readable text
issue.loginWall: Sign in to read the page text
issue.challengePage: Complete the page verification and try again
issue.imageOrCanvasOnly: This page is mostly image or canvas content, so text cannot be read directly
issue.lowQualityExtraction: Readable page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
issue.collectorUnavailable: Page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
issue.tabUnavailable: Switch back to the page you want to read and try again
issue.metadataUnavailable: Page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
issue.timeout: Page text is not available yet. Refresh the page and try again
issue.captureQuotaLimited: Page screenshots are not available right now

technologyStack.title: Page Technology Stack
technologyStack.privacy: Shows only summarized public page signals, never cookie values, HTML, scripts, or CSS source.
technologyStack.empty: No clear technology signal was identified on this page.
technologyStack.uncollectable: This page type does not support technology-stack detection.

errorReason.content-script-unreachable: The Olyq page script is not responding on the current page. Refresh the page and try again.
errorReason.content-script-not-ready: The Olyq page script is still starting on the current page. Try again in a moment or refresh the page.
errorReason.content-script-injection-failed: The page script could not be injected or started on this page. Refresh the page and try again.
errorReason.page-access-unavailable: The browser blocked extension access to this page. Switch to a regular webpage and try again.
errorReason.page-uncollectable: This page type does not support technology-stack detection.
errorReason.tab-unavailable: The current tab is unavailable. Switch back to the webpage you want to inspect and try again.
errorReason.rule-package-unavailable: The local technology-stack rule package could not be read. Reload the extension and try again.
errorReason.page-stale: The page just navigated, so this detection result is stale. Detect again.
errorReason.bundle-missing: The extension page-script bundle is missing. Rebuild or reload the extension and try again.
errorReason.technology-stack-unavailable: The detection pipeline is temporarily unavailable. Refresh the page and try again.

minimalPage.title: Lightweight Page
minimalPage.description: Default general mode that prioritizes the main article body and outline.

deepPage.title: Deep Page
deepPage.description: Best for deep reading and analysis with a larger body budget.

focusedSnippet.title: Focused Snippet
focusedSnippet.description: Prioritizes the latest selection, then supplements it with page context.

structuredExtraction.title: Structured Extraction
structuredExtraction.description: Best for extracting fields, lists, and structured page elements.

workflowAware.title: Workflow Aware
workflowAware.description: Combines page, selection, and element context for workflow-heavy tasks.
